prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - high-endurance performance with carb-loading and hydration strategy

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4-5 eating occasions with calorie-dense, carbohydrate-focused meals totaling 3,500-4,000 calories
Meals are timed around training session (pre-, during, and post-workout nutrition specified)
Hydration strategy includes fluid intake recommendations throughout the day
Format is compact and concise (single day, easy to read)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring calorie-dense, carb-loaded meals with hydration strategies and timing around training sessions

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize muscle recovery and strength gains through strategic protein timing around weightlifting sessions

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4-5 meals distributed across the day with at least 25g protein per meal
Pre-workout and post-workout meals are strategically timed and identified
Total daily caloric and macronutrient targets are appropriate for a strength athlete at this weight
Plan is presented in a compact, single-day format with clear meal timing
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing protein-rich meals strategically timed for muscle recovery and pre/post-workout nutrition windows

prompt_inputs.goal: Maintain energy and performance for competitive soccer match in evening

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers full day with 3+ meals/snacks providing adequate calories and balanced macronutrients for athlete
All foods are plant-based with no animal products
Includes specific plant-based protein sources to support muscle performance
Format is compact and concise (single day, easy to read)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific dietary restriction (vegan soccer player) requiring plant-based alternatives while maintaining balanced macronutrients and energy levels for competitive performance
